## Summary
- enforce strict revise card contract checks for candidate prose readiness
- harden queue/cockpit rendering to use validator-backed candidate text path
- ensure diagnostics remain separate from A/B/C manuscript prose
- add deterministic revision package + go-live proof payload plumbing for workbench consumers
- render queue in caution mode when Phase 0 warmup proof is unavailable (fail-open for queue data, guards remain enforced)
- update focused unit/smoke tests for contract and V2 clients

## Verification
- npm test -- --runInBand __tests__/lib/revision/reviseCardContract.test.ts __tests__/lib/revision/workbenchQueue.test.ts tests/components/ReviseQueueV2Client.smoke.test.tsx tests/components/ReviseCockpitClient.smoke.test.tsx

## Notes
- this PR includes adjacent queue payload hardening (revisionPackage/goLiveProof) introduced with the contract guard pass
- warmup proof availability now degrades with explicit caution instead of blocking queue rendering
